actions.expression:
SELECT buyercodeapply.sid,
       buyercodeapply.policyNo,
       buyercodeapply.wfgs,
       buyercodeapply.clientNo,
       buyercodeapply.countryCode,
       buyercodeapply.engName,
       buyercodeapply.engAddress,
       buyercodeapply.chnName,
       buyercodeapply.chnAddress,
       buyercodeapply.regNo,
       buyercodeapply.tel,
       buyercodeapply.fax,
       buyercodeapply.applyTime,
       buyercodeapply.ywbm,
       buyercodeapply.ywry,
       buyercodeapply.jhfs,
       buyercodeapply.rzyh,
       buyercodeapply.glbz,
       buyercodeapply.clientNo1
FROM buyercodeapply 
WHERE (buyercodeapply.buyerNo1=[出运申报.中国信保买方代码]) 
  AND permission('') 
ORDER BY buyercodeapply.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.expression:

FROM xbzxsheet 
WHERE (xbzxsheet.ssmk="国家代码") 
ORDER BY xbzxsheet.mc ASC
